/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,cimgui.so -o cimgui.so CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/cimgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/cimgui_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cimgui.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o
